### Props

| Name                  | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                       |
| --------------------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `schemaItem`          | `object`  | ✓        | —       | The full schema item — mutates authorization directly             |
| `userGroups`          | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Full user groups array                                            |
| `sortedUserGroups`    | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Filtered/sorted user groups (excludes admin/public/authenticated) |
| `loadingGroups`       | `boolean` |          | `false` | Whether groups are loading                                        |
| `hasAnyPermissions`   | `boolean` |          | `false` | Whether schema has any permissions set                            |
| `isRestrictiveSchema` | `boolean` |          | `false` | Whether schema has restrictive permissions                        |
| `inheritedProperties` | `object`  |          | `\{\}`  | Properties inherited from parent schemas (allOf)                  |
